name: Uniflora, Mystical Beast of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ユニフォリア
name_jp_tl: Unifolia, Holy Beast of the Forest
desc: If all the monsters in your Graveyard are Beast-Type: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Beast-Type monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Uniflora, Mystical Beast of the Forest", but it cannot attack this turn.
mnst_eff: If all the monsters in your Graveyard are Beast-Type: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Beast-Type monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Uniflora, Mystical Beast of the Forest", but it cannot attack this turn.
eff: If all the monsters in your Graveyard are Beast-Type: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Beast-Type monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Uniflora, Mystical Beast of the Forest", but it cannot attack this turn.
